test_cases.label: Web Portal Login
test_cases.task: Go to https://web.dev.marxpos.com and log in using phone {{WEB_PHONE}} and password {{WEB_PASSWORD}}. Stop as soon as the authenticated dashboard or home screen is visible. Return 'SUCCESS' if login worked, otherwise describe what went wrong.

test_cases.label: Web Portal Smoke Checks
test_cases.task: You are on https://web.dev.marxpos.com already logged in (phone={{WEB_PHONE}}, password={{WEB_PASSWORD}} if re-login needed). Open at least five distinct navigation modules, perform safe read-only interactions in each (search, filter, or open a detail view), and confirm there are no blocker errors. Return a short summary of every module checked and PASS/FAIL per module.

test_cases.label: Admin Portal Login
test_cases.task: Go to https://admin.dev.marxpos.com and log in using username {{ADMIN_USERNAME}} and password {{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}. Stop as soon as the admin dashboard or home screen is visible. Return 'SUCCESS' if login worked, otherwise describe what went wrong.

test_cases.label: Admin Portal Smoke Checks
test_cases.task: You are on https://admin.dev.marxpos.com already logged in (username={{ADMIN_USERNAME}}, password={{ADMIN_PASSWORD}} if re-login needed). Open at least five distinct admin modules, perform safe read-only interactions in each, and confirm no blocker errors. Return a short summary of every module checked and PASS/FAIL per module.
